simple_types.name: Channel_State
simple_types.code: type Channel_State is (Closed, Opening, Open, Closing);

simple_types.name: Event_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Event_Kind is
  (None,
   Channel_Open,
   Channel_Open_Confirm,
   Channel_Open_Failure,
   Channel_EOF,
   Channel_Close,
   Channel_Data,
   Channel_Extended_Data,
,
,
   …,
   Request_Failure);

enumeration_literals.name: Channel_Failure
enumeration_literals.description:
peer rejected our channel-specific request
 Global request events

array_types.name: Event_Array
array_types.code: type Event_Array is array (1 .. MAX_EVENTS) of Connection_Event;

array_types.name: Terminal_Mode_List
array_types.code: type Terminal_Mode_List is array (Positive range <>) of Terminal_Mode_Entry;

record_types.name: Connection_Event
Terminal_Mode_Entry
